headline: Chipotle-style chain shuts restaurants, exits key market
summary: While not every American would be considered a picky eater, it's a major challenge to introduce unfamiliar food to people outside of what they're already comfortable with. "Consumers are programmed from early childhood to prefer familiar foods," according to the academic paper Consumer responses to ...

headline: Maple Leaf Foods: Re-Rated, But Upside Still On The Table
